spec_match.rationale: Probes document.compatMode in the PiP window — directly the spec fix v131 introduces (PiP inherits opener compat mode).

interactive.rationale: Opens PiP and shows compatMode + computed sizes side-by-side with the opener.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises a side-by-side compatMode probe; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Only tests on a standards-mode opener. Doesn't show what happens if opener is itself quirks-mode (PiP should now inherit quirks).

references.rationale: See also has no chromestatus.com link. Rule #3 regression.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, side-by-side panels follow design system.

openQuestions.title: Test inheritance from a quirks-mode opener
openQuestions.detail: The fix's behaviour is symmetric: quirks-mode opener should produce a quirks-mode PiP. Add an iframe in quirks mode that opens its own PiP to demonstrate this direction.

summary: Useful compatMode probe across the opener/PiP boundary. Missing the chromestatus reference and only tests the standards-mode opener direction.
